files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.AccountController
files.Summary: Endpoints for user accounts: login/logout, registration, two-factor authentication (TOTP), password reset and e-mail verification. Sessions are issued via an HttpOnly JWT cookie plus a CSRF double-submit cookie.

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.ChatController
files.Summary: Read access to chat history. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Real-time delivery of new messages is handled by ; this controller only serves the persisted message history.

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.EventsController
files.Summary: Manages calendar events, both personal (no workspace) and workspace-shared, including creation, editing, deletion and various queries (counts, lists, linked workspace). All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes to workspace events are pushed live to the workspace group over the .

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.FoldersController
files.Summary: Manages note folders, both personal (no workspace) and workspace-shared, including creation, editing, moving and recursive deletion. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes to workspace folders are pushed live to the workspace group over the .

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.FriendshipController
files.Summary: Manages friendships: sending, accepting and rejecting friend requests, removing friends, and listing incoming/outgoing requests and current friends. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes are pushed live to the affected user over the so clients update without a reload.

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.NotesController
files.Summary: Manages notes and their content modules — text blocks and link items — both personal (no workspace) and workspace-shared. Covers creating, editing, moving, ordering and deleting notes and modules, plus various queries. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes to workspace notes are pushed live to the workspace group over the .

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.TodoListsController
files.Summary: Manages todo lists and their entries, both personal (no workspace) and workspace-shared, including creation, editing, deletion and various queries. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes to workspace items are pushed live to the workspace group over the .

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.UsersController
files.Summary: User profile and account management plus user discovery: editing the current user's profile and avatar, deleting the account, reading profile/account/preview data by ID or for the current user, recent activity (todos/events/notes), related users, and user search. All endpoints require an authenticated user.

files.Title: lumify.api.Controllers.WorkspaceController
files.Summary: Manages workspaces (shared spaces) and their memberships: creating, renaming and deleting workspaces, adding and removing members, and querying workspaces and members. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes are pushed live to every affected member over the .

files.Title: lumify.api.Hubs.ChatHub
files.Summary: SignalR hub for real-time chat and user presence. Tracks each user's active connections via the presence service, broadcasts presence changes to all clients, and handles joining rooms, leaving rooms and sending messages. Requires an authenticated connection.

files.Title: lumify.api.Hubs.EventHub
files.Summary: SignalR hub for real-time calendar event updates within a workspace. Clients join the group of a workspace to receive its live events (EventCreated, EventUpdated, EventDeleted) broadcast by the . Requires an authenticated connection.

files.Title: lumify.api.Hubs.NoteHub
files.Summary: SignalR hub for real-time folder and note updates within a workspace. Clients join the group of a workspace to receive its live events (e.g. NoteCreated, NoteUpdated, NoteDeleted, FolderCreated, …) broadcast by the and . Requires an authenticated connection.

files.Title: lumify.api.Hubs.TodoHub
files.Summary: SignalR hub for real-time todo list/entry updates within a workspace. Clients join the group of a workspace to receive its live events (TodoListCreated, TodoListUpdated, TodoEntryCreated, TodoEntryUpdated, …) broadcast by the . Requires an authenticated connection.

files.Title: lumify.api.Hubs.UserIdProvider
files.Summary: Maps the custom UserID claim to the SignalR user identifier, so that Clients.User(userID) targets all of a user's active hub connections.

files.Title: lumify.api.Hubs.WorkspaceHub
files.Summary: SignalR hub for real-time workspace and membership updates. Unlike the other workspace hubs, clients join a group keyed by their own user ID (a user can belong to many workspaces), so the can push events such as WorkspaceCreated, WorkspaceUpdated, WorkspaceDeleted, WorkspaceMemberAdded and WorkspaceMemberRemoved to every affected member. Requires an authenticated connection.

files.Title: lumify.api.Interfaces.IEmailService
files.Summary: Abstraction for sending transactional e-mails (password reset and address verification). Implemented by .

files.Title: lumify.api.Interfaces.IPresenceService
files.Summary: Tracks which users are currently online by counting their active SignalR connections. Implemented by and driven by on connect/disconnect.

files.Title: lumify.api.Logic.CsrfMiddleware
files.Summary: ASP.NET Core middleware enforcing CSRF protection via the double-submit-cookie pattern: for mutating requests (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) the X-CSRF-Token header must match the XSRF-TOKEN cookie, using a constant-time comparison.

files.Title: lumify.api.Logic.InternalLogic
files.Summary: Central helper for authentication and account security: password hashing/verification, JWT issuing, single-use token generation/hashing (password reset and e-mail verification), two-factor authentication (TOTP secret, QR code, code verification, MFA challenge tokens) and avatar file handling. Used primarily by the .

files.Title: lumify.api.Migrations.AddEmailVerification
files.Summary: A base class inherited by each EF Core migration.

files.Title: lumify.api.Migrations.AddTodoProgressViewAndStatusTriggers
files.Summary: A base class inherited by each EF Core migration.

files.Title: lumify.api.Migrations.AddTotp
files.Summary: A base class inherited by each EF Core migration.

files.Title: lumify.api.Migrations.InitialCreate
files.Summary: A base class inherited by each EF Core migration.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.Context.LumifyDbContext
files.Summary: Entity Framework Core database context for Lumify. Exposes the entity sets and configures the relational model (table mappings, indexes and relationships) against the MariaDB database.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddEventRequest
files.Summary: Request body for creating a calendar event (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddFolderRequest
files.Summary: Request body for creating a folder (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddLinkItemRequest
files.Summary: Request body for adding a link item module to a note (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddNoteRequest
files.Summary: Request body for creating a note (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddTextBlockRequest
files.Summary: Request body for adding a text block module to a note (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddTodoEntryRequest
files.Summary: Request body for adding an entry to a todo list (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddTodoListRequest
files.Summary: Request body for creating a todo list (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddWorkspaceMemberRequest
files.Summary: Request body for adding a member to a workspace (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.AddWorkspaceRequest
files.Summary: Request body for creating a workspace (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.LoginRequest
files.Summary: Request body for login (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.RegisterRequest
files.Summary: Request body for registration (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.RequestPasswordResetRequest
files.Summary: Request body for requesting a password reset link (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.ResendVerificationRequest
files.Summary: Request body for resending an e-mail verification link (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.ResetPasswordRequest
files.Summary: Request body for setting a new password via a reset link (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.SaveEventRequest
files.Summary: Request body for updating an event (see ). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.SaveFolderRequest
files.Summary: Request body for updating a folder (see ). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update); an empty parent moves to the root.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.SaveNoteRequest
files.Summary: Request body for updating a note (see ). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update); an empty folder moves to the root.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.SaveTextblockRequest
files.Summary: Request body for updating a text block module (see ). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.SaveTodoListRequest
files.Summary: Request body for updating a todo list (see ). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.SaveUserProfileRequest
files.Summary: Request body for updating the current user's profile (see ). Only non-null fields are applied; empty values clear the respective field.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.SaveWorkspaceRequest
files.Summary: Request body for renaming a workspace (see ). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.TotpCodeRequest
files.Summary: Request body carrying a single TOTP code, used to confirm 2FA setup and to disable it again (see / ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.VerifyEmailRequest
files.Summary: Request body for confirming an e-mail address (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests.VerifyTotpLoginRequest
files.Summary: Request body for the second login step with 2FA (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.ChatMessageResponse
files.Summary: A chat message returned to clients, with the sender's resolved display name (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.EventResponse
files.Summary: A calendar event returned to clients (see ). The all-day flag is exposed as a bool (mapped from the entity's integer).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.FolderResponse
files.Summary: A folder returned to clients (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.FriendshipResponse
files.Summary: A friendship/friend-request returned to clients. The requester fields are populated for incoming requests; the friend fields for outgoing requests (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.LinkItemResponse
files.Summary: A link item module returned to clients (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.NoteResponse
files.Summary: A note (metadata only) returned to clients; its modules are fetched separately (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.RelatedUserResponse
files.Summary: A user that can be added to a workspace, returned by workspace member search (see ), enriched with live presence status.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.TextblockResponse
files.Summary: A text block module returned to clients (see ). The collapsed flag is exposed as a bool (mapped from the entity's integer).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.TodoEntryResponse
files.Summary: A todo entry returned to clients (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.TodoListResponse
files.Summary: A todo list returned to clients (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.UserAccountInfoResponse
files.Summary: Account information for a user (name, e-mail, username, timestamps), returned by the account-info endpoints (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.UserPreviewResponse
files.Summary: A compact public preview of a user (used in lists and search), enriched with live presence status (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.UserProfileResponse
files.Summary: The public profile of a user (display name, avatar, bio), returned by the profile endpoints (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.WorkspaceMemberResponse
files.Summary: A workspace member with their user profile and role (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.DTO.Responses.WorkspaceResponse
files.Summary: A workspace returned to clients (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.ChatMessage
files.Summary: A single chat message in a room. Persisted by and read back via . Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.EmailVerificationToken
files.Summary: A single-use token backing an e-mail verification link. Only the hash of the token is stored (same approach as ), so a leaked row cannot be turned back into a working link.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Event
files.Summary: A calendar event, either personal ( null) or workspace-shared. Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Folder
files.Summary: A folder that organizes notes, either personal or workspace-shared. Folders can be nested via . Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Friendship
files.Summary: A relationship between two users (friend request or accepted friendship). Stored once per user pair using ordered / keys; the requester/addressee fields record who initiated it. See .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Note
files.Summary: A note container, either personal or workspace-shared, optionally filed in a folder. Its body is an ordered list of modules (text blocks and link items). Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.NoteAttachment
files.Summary: A file attached to a note. Stores the upload metadata and the name under which the file is stored on disk. Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Note_LinkItem
files.Summary: A link item module within a note — a labelled URL. Ordered within the note via . Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Note_TextBlock
files.Summary: A text block module within a note (e.g. paragraph, heading or code block). Ordered within the note via . Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.PasswordResetToken
files.Summary: A single-use token backing a password-reset link. Only the hash of the token is stored, so a leaked row cannot be turned back into a working reset link.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Role
files.Summary: The role of a , persisted to the database by name.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.TodoEntry
files.Summary: A single item within a . Toggling its status keeps the parent list's status in sync. Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.TodoList
files.Summary: A todo list, either personal or workspace-shared, holding a set of items. Its status is derived from its entries (done when all entries are done). Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.User
files.Summary: A registered user account. The central entity most other content references via its owner. Soft-deleted via ; timestamps are stored as ISO-8601 strings.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.Workspace
files.Summary: A shared space that groups content (folders, notes, todo lists, events) and members. Content belongs to the workspace, not its creator. Soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.EF.WorkspaceMember
files.Summary: Join entity linking a to a with a role. A removed membership is soft-deleted via .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.Enum.FriendshipStatus
files.Summary: The status of a , stored as an integer in the database.

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.Enum.PresenceStatus
files.Summary: A user's real-time presence state, derived from their active connections by the .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.Settings.AppSettings
files.Summary: Options bound from the App configuration section. Used to build user-facing links (e.g. the password-reset link that points at the frontend, not the API).

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.Settings.EmailSettings
files.Summary: Options bound from the Email configuration section. The actual SMTP credentials come from the mail hosting and are filled in per environment. Consumed by .

files.Title: lumify.api.Models.Settings.JwtSettings
files.Summary: Options bound from the Jwt configuration section, used to sign and validate JWT session and MFA tokens (see ).

files.Title: lumify.api.Services.FriendshipService
files.Summary: Encapsulates the friendship domain logic used by the : sending, accepting, rejecting and removing friendships, including the validation and state transitions involved.

files.Title: lumify.api.Services.PresenceService
files.Summary: In-memory implementation of . Maintains the mapping between users and their open SignalR connections in thread-safe dictionaries; a user counts as online while at least one connection is registered.

files.Title: lumify.api.Services.SmtpEmailService
files.Summary: implementation that sends mail over SMTP via MailKit. SMTP credentials come from the Email configuration section (per environment). This is the only component that talks to the mail server.
